commands.review_summary:
The PR persists exact resolved npm registry specs for managed official plugin install records across official update, onboarding, doctor repair, and update-channel sync paths while preserving moving specs for third-party records and manual exact pins.

PR surface: Source +58, Tests +236. Total +294 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the blocking PR defect: source inspection of the current PR head shows two added imports in `src/infra/state-migrations.ts` with no usage. The user-facing warning behavior has supplied real macOS proof, but I did not rerun the CLI flow because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] A narrow automated repair can remove the unused imports; the remaining compatibility/security-audit acceptance is maintainer judgment before merge.
